description_long: A stack of four golden-brown pancakes is shown, each pancake slightly irregular in shape and thickness, giving a homemade appearance. The top pancake is adorned with two circular pats of butter, several blueberries, and scattered small pink candy-like sprinkles. The pancakes have a soft, fluffy texture with slightly crisp, uneven edges, and the surfaces are matte with subtle browning. No syrup is visible on or around the pancakes, and they are not placed on any plate or serving surface. The overall look is appetizing and playful, with the colorful toppings providing a visual contrast to the warm tones of the pancakes.
description: A stack of four golden-brown pancakes topped with butter, blueberries, and pink sprinkles, with no plate or syrup present.
description_view_0: Front view shows the stack of pancakes with butter, blueberries, and pink sprinkles clearly visible on top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the butter pats and blueberries, with the pink sprinkles more evenly distributed across the top pancake.
description_view_2: The butter and blueberries are seen from a slight angle, with the stack's irregular edges and thickness more apparent.
description_view_3: The butter pats are prominent, and the blueberries and pink sprinkles are scattered mostly toward the back of the stack.
